issues.description: Fail-open architectural flaw in permission resolution. In 'resolvePolicy' (line 92), if a resource has no parent and its policy is set to 'INHERIT' (the default), the system defaults to 'Policy.ALLOW'. This means any registered resource without an explicit policy or a valid parent chain is accessible by any role, violating the principle of least privilege.
Architecture lacks cycle detection. If two resources are registered as each other's parents, 'resolvePolicy' will enter an infinite recursion, leading to a StackOverflowError (Denial of Service).

false_positive_traps.description: The use of 'ConcurrentHashMap' for 'resourceTree' is a correct choice for a multi-threaded security service.
The 'rootRole' override on line 66 is a standard 'Superuser' pattern and is not a bug.
